title: WorkItem
description: A hierarchical work item representing a Program, Project, or Study

work_item_id.description: Unique identifier for the work item

work_item_type.description: Type of work item in the hierarchy

description.description: Detailed description of the work item

status.description: Current status of the work item

parent_work_item_id.description: Foreign key reference to parent work item (creates Program > Project > Study hierarchy)

primary_org_id.description: Foreign key reference to the primary organization for this work item

synapse_id.description: Synapse platform identifier for the work item
